entities.name: WIPO PATENTSCOPE
entities.rating_basis: ToS §2.1 forbids automated queries; paid SOAP/SFTP only

entities.name: WIPO Madrid System
entities.rating_basis: ToS §6 bans automated queries (≤10 actions/min/IP); CHF 30,000/yr ICC FTP bulk is only programmatic path

entities.name: WIPO Hague System
entities.rating_basis: Hague Express is just a collection=Hague filter on Global Design DB (same backend, same ToS, robots.txt disallow); Hague Web Services is partner-IP-office-only

entities.name: WIPO Lex
entities.rating_basis: Free polite scrape; substantive-law backbone (~50k statutes/treaties/decisions across ~200 jurisdictions). Only WIPO public database not ToS-blocked.

shipped_sources.name: WIPO Lex — global IP legislation & treaties

entities.name: WIPO Global Brand Database
entities.rating_basis: ToS prohibits automation; idAPI 188 restricted to "collaborating IP Offices"; CAPTCHA-walled UI

entities.name: WIPO Global Design Database
entities.rating_basis: ToS prohibits automation; only Hague Web Services (filing-side, IP-office-only); 24-hour IP block

entities.name: European Patent Office
entities.rating_basis: Free OAuth2 OPS API; INPADOC backbone for ~100 offices

shipped_sources.name: EPO Boards of Appeal Case Law Compendium

entities.name: European Union Intellectual Property Office
entities.rating_basis: Free OAuth2 OpenAPI; EUTM + REUD (formerly RCD)

entities.name: Unified Patent Court
entities.rating_basis: Decisions feed (Drupal Views HTML harvester) + UPCA/RoP statute corpus both shipped 🟢. CMS Public Read API v5.3 (the opt-out registry path) is 🔴 — TLS-blocked at handshake for unenrolled clients; enrollment only via Athena contact form.

shipped_sources.name: Unified Patent Court — Statutes & Rules of Procedure

entities.name: Eurasian Patent Office
entities.rating_basis: Not yet researched

entities.name: African Regional Intellectual Property Organization
entities.rating_basis:
Two HTML-only front ends (KIPO-built eService at eservice.aripo.org/pdl
that redirects users to WIPO Publish at regionalip.aripo.org); ARIPO
Journal as monthly PDFs (2015→present); no REST/JSON API; 0 entries in
WIPO IP API Catalog; no developer program; data.aripo.org / api.aripo.org
don't exist. Patents already in EPO OPS / INPADOC under country code AP —
use the existing epo_ops connector transitively.

entities.name: African Intellectual Property Organization (OAPI)
entities.rating_basis:
Register on bare-IP HTTP-only WoPublish (195.24.202.12:9092, no TLS);
BOPI gazette PDF only; 2024 e-filing portal (TMs only) is write-only and
agent-gated; WIPO INSPIRE profile states verbatim "OAPI does not have an
Online Register. It has an Online Gazette." 0 entries in WIPO IP API
Catalog. Patents transitively in EPO OPS / INPADOC under country code OA.

entities.name: GCC Patent Office (legacy)
entities.rating_basis: Closed for new applications since 2021-01-06; legacy register sunsets ~2041

entities.name: USPTO
entities.rating_basis: Free public APIs across all services; statutory open-data mandate

shipped_sources.name: USPTO Open Data Portal — PTAB proceedings

entities.name: US Copyright Office
entities.rating_basis: Free anonymous Public Records System (PRS) REST API at api.publicrecords.copyright.gov. US is unusual among Berne jurisdictions in operating a copyright register at all — registration is constitutive of statutory damages + attorneys' fees (17 USC §§411, 412, 504, 505).

entities.name: Japan Patent Office
entities.rating_basis: Free with credentials (JPO_API_USERNAME + PASSWORD); BYOK pattern

entities.name: KIPO Korea
entities.rating_basis: KIPRIS Plus API real and clean; ToS §11 forbids key sharing → BYOK only

shipped_sources.name: KIPO Korea — Patents and Utility Models (KIPRIS Plus)

entities.name: CNIPA China
entities.rating_basis: Every endpoint WAF-blocked from US egress; 2025 TM platform requires CN mainland mobile + real-name verification — foreigners structurally excluded

entities.name: DPMA Germany
entities.rating_basis: DPMAconnectPlus REST permits per-user self-hosted access — EUR 200 one-time Datenempfänger contract, fixed-IP Basic-auth credentials, no German residency required, EU-SCC auto-attached for non-EU recipients (§8). Prior red_contract reading misread §3.2 — the clause prohibits rebroadcasting data records (zero-infra proxy is barred), NOT self-hosted BYOK by the contracting party. Synopsis update + BACKLOG entry queued 2026-05-18. Statutes corpus already shipped separately.

shipped_sources.name: DPMA Germany — IP statutes (PatG, MarkenG, GebrMG, DesignG, UrhG, GeschGehG)

entities.name: UKIPO United Kingdom
entities.rating_basis: IPSUM retired Jan 2025; One IPO replacement HTML-only; no API timeline

entities.name: INPI France
entities.rating_basis: api-gateway.inpi.fr is the cleanest national REST surface surveyed (JSON, SolR Lucene, ST.36/66/86); session-bearer + XSRF auth bound to personal data.inpi.fr account (NOT PISTE — older survey was wrong); 10 req/min throttle

entities.name: CIPO Canada
entities.rating_basis: Zero REST APIs across all rights; CanLII covers case law

entities.name: IP Australia
entities.rating_basis: Modern OAuth2 OpenAPI across all rights + IP RAPID bulk (CC-BY 4.0)

shipped_sources.name: IP Australia — Australian Trade Mark Search
IP Australia — IP RAPID (data.gov.au bulk register)

entities.name: IPO India
entities.rating_basis: Per older survey — every live asset CAPTCHA-gated; statutes shipped

shipped_sources.name: IPO India — IP statutes (Patents Act 1970, Designs Act 2000, Trade Marks Act 1999, Copyright Act 1957, Patent Rules 2003)
IPO India — Manual of Patent Practice & Procedure

entities.name: INPI Brazil
entities.rating_basis: Live register has no public REST (pePI is HTML+CAPTCHA+ToS-hostile); RPI weekly XML + dados.gov.br annual are bulk-only (violates zero-infra-proxy constraint). Coverage via EPO OPS + Google Patents.

entities.name: IPOS Singapore
entities.rating_basis: IP2SG transactional APIs Singpass/CorpPass-gated to SG-resident entities (filing-side only); data.gov.sg collection 281 biblio-only with patents frozen Aug 2018→Oct 2020; Digital Hub is ASP.NET __VIEWSTATE HTML. INPADOC + Madrid + Hague cover the cross-border slice.

entities.name: ILPO Israel
entities.rating_basis: israelpatents.justice.gov.il is an Angular SPA fronted by CSRF + reCAPTCHA + Glassbox session capture (explicit anti-automation perimeter); TM and Design portals are ASP.NET WebForms with no API; data.gov.il TM CKAN feed is bulk-shaped.

entities.name: TIPO Taiwan
entities.rating_basis: Swagger 2.0 REST API at cloud.tipo.gov.tw/S220/opdataapi/ verified live; Taiwan OGDL v1.0 (CC-BY-4.0 + explicit sublicensing); 15 GET ops; 1.45M patents + 3.39M trademarks

entities.name: Rospatent Russia
entities.rating_basis: Politics + economics — Decree 299/2022 zeros foreign-patentee compensation; Decree 430; USPTO termination (2022); EU 18th sanctions package (19 Jul 2025) extended No-Russia clauses to IP/know-how/trade secrets; EPO suspension. WIPO has NOT suspended Russia (PCT/Madrid/Hague still routing).

entities.name: IMPI Mexico
entities.rating_basis: Infrastructure-level US-egress packet drop on every *.impi.gob.mx subdomain (silent TCP timeout, not WAF 403, not geofence content). Only marcia.impi.gob.mx survives on a different CDN, covers only TM slice (~25%).

entities.name: DGIP Indonesia
entities.rating_basis: PDKI and every DGIP transaction subdomain walled behind Alibaba Cloud ESA + Imperva/Incapsula + Distil behavioral fingerprinting. Zero DGIP entries in WIPO IP API Catalog. ID hosts the regional ASEAN IP Register server but locks its own front door.

entities.name: TÜRKPATENT Turkey
entities.rating_basis: Not yet researched

entities.name: Swiss Federal Institute of Intellectual Property
entities.rating_basis: IPI datadelivery API at swissreg.ch/public/api/v1 is XML over HTTPS POST + OIDC ROPC auth (Keycloak at idp.ipi.ch). Free; 2 GiB/24h rolling quota. Covers TMs, patents, patent pubs, SPCs, SPC pubs — NOT designs. ToU §2 forbids credential sharing → BYOK only.

entities.name: RVO Netherlands
entities.rating_basis: BPP eRegister is Struts2 server-rendered; structured outputs limited to saved-search RSS + per-document XML download requiring opaque docId from prior HTML search + 1,000-row CSV export. NL feeds a daily delta to EPO Federated Register — coverage closes transitively via EPO OPS.

entities.name: PRV Sweden
entities.rating_basis: Three undocumented unauthenticated REST/JSON APIs (patents-search-api.prv.se, dv-search-api.prv.se, api.prv.se) reverse-engineered from beta UI bundle.js. CC0 / CC BY 4.0 on parallel bulk feeds + Sweden's Open Data Act SFS 2022:818. Probes returned 764k patents + 89 IKEA TMs + design records.

entities.name: PRH Finland
entities.rating_basis: Three independent unauthenticated JSON APIs under one office (patenttitietopalvelu.prh.fi/nis-api-gateway-pat/, tavaramerkkitietopalvelu.prh.fi/nis-api-gateway/, mallioikeustietopalvelu.prh.fi/nis-api-gateway/) covering 393,750 patents + UM + SPC + EP-FI, 282,824 TMs back to 1891, 33,682 designs back to 1971. Per-application GET returns true register-fidelity prosecution data.

entities.name: Austrian Patent Office
entities.rating_basis: see.ip (seeip.patentamt.at) is a Next.js SPA relaunched 2026-03-05 with no API, no developer portal, no entry in WIPO IP API Catalog (179 APIs across 10 offices — zero ÖPA). Legacy ASP.NET helpers now 404. patentamt.at Impressum explicitly restricts content to personal use; commercial reuse and third-party disclosure require written consent.

entities.name: OEPM Spain
entities.rating_basis: OEPM publishes 5 free SOAP/XML web services (INVENES + Diseños, CEO, CLINMAR, Localizador de marcas, BOPI-LOPD) requiring per-applicant credentials. WIPO ST.36/66/86 compliance (since 2019-01-01 for ST.36). Aviso legal explicitly permits commercial AND non-commercial reuse with attribution under Ley 37/2007 (EU Open Data Directive transposition).

entities.name: UIBM Italy
entities.rating_basis: No REST/JSON/XML API. Absent from WIPO IP API Catalog (0/179). Zero presence on dati.gov.it. Bancadati AJAX endpoints DO respond unauthenticated (1,298 Ferrari records pulled empirically) but Note Legali PDF explicitly forbids "deep linking" (Vietato il cd. 'deep linking') + HTML chunks not JSON + recaptcha tripwire could activate without notice.

entities.name: IPONZ New Zealand
entities.rating_basis: v5 API on MBIE shared gateway at api.business.govt.nz/gateway/iponz/v5/; portal at portal.api.business.govt.nz/api/iponz. Every caller needs RealMe + MBIE subscription key + optional OAuth2 bearer. Chargeable ops require direct-debit/credit billing. IPONZ copyright statement carves the *registers* out of the otherwise-permissive Crown-copyright reuse grant.

entities.name: CIPC South Africa
entities.rating_basis:
IPS API ("trademarks/patents/designs/copyright" JSON surface) is marked
"Coming Soon" on developer.cipc.co.za (APIVerse Hub); only Companies/
BO/Authorisation APIs are live. eServices T&Cs prohibit derived works
and restrict reuse to per-client deployment (incompatible with hosted
multi-tenant proxy). Live IP register is HTML-only ASP.NET WebForms at
iponline.cipc.co.za. SA also still NOT a Madrid Protocol member as of
2026-05-18 — Trade Marks Amendment Bill targeted Sept 2025 has stalled.

entities.name: INPI Argentina
entities.rating_basis: Live WSDL at ws.inpi.gob.ar/wsinpi.asmx?WSDL is a filer-portal SOAP — six Ingresar_* submission ops + three narrow Consulta* reads that are TM-only and CUIT-bound (no shared-key posture contemplated). Same false-positive shape as BR/INPI's swagger. AR has never joined PCT.

entities.name: DIP Thailand
entities.rating_basis: DIP Data Exchange platform at api.ipthailand.go.th/data-exchange/ catalogues 21 documented REST APIs across all six DIP rights (patents, petty patents, designs, TMs, copyright, music copyright, GI, statistics). Bearer-token auth via two-step paper-contract registration (DPMA / KIPO shape).

entities.name: IPOPHL Philippines
entities.rating_basis: WIPO Publish at wipopublish.ipophil.gov.ph is Apache Wicket SSR HTML over internal Solr core (Solr ?query=OFCO:PH works but pagination is Wicket-coordinate, no JSON envelope). onlineservices.ipophil.gov.ph is Incapsula-WAF-walled. Zero IPOPHL entries in WIPO IP API Catalog. No IPOPHL datasets on data.gov.ph.

entities.name: UAE Ministry of Economy IP
entities.rating_basis: UAE Patent Hive 2025 initiative; not yet researched

entities.name: SAIP Saudi Arabia
entities.rating_basis: Saudi Vision 2030 initiative; not yet researched

entities.name: Egyptian Authority for Intellectual Property (consolidating EGYPO + ITDA)
entities.rating_basis:
EGYPO patents run on a hosted WIPO PUBLISH instance at
egypo.gov.eg/wopublish-search/public/patents — HTML only, no JSON envelope.
ITDA TM/Designs office publishes a monthly TM gazette PDF at
itda.gov.eg/jurnal-TM.aspx; no national designs register exists at all.
0 entries in WIPO IP API Catalog for EG. Law 163/2023 dissolves both
offices into the new Egyptian Authority for Intellectual Property (EAIP)
reporting to the Prime Minister — transition deadline 2024-08-05 +
6 months. As of 2026-05-18 the legacy sites still serve; EAIP has no
discoverable canonical web property yet.

entities.name: Nigeria Federal Ministry of Industry, Trade and Investment IP Registries
entities.rating_basis:
Login-gated SvelteKit SPA at portal.iponigeria.com (Patents/Designs/TMs);
legacy static JSP at nipo.gov.ng; ASP.NET MVC NCeRS portal at
copyright.gov.ng (HTTP 502 at probe). TM search restricted to accredited
agents. IPO Nigeria ToU explicitly prohibits reproduction/redistribution/
reverse-engineering. 0 NG entries in WIPO IP API Catalog. NIPCOM bill
(Industrial Property Commission) not yet enacted as of 2026-05-18;
NIPPS (approved 2025-11-06) only proposes prospective digitization.
NG is also NOT a Madrid Protocol member (refuted prior assumption).

entities.name: Companies and Intellectual Property Authority (Botswana)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP (Botswana is a Harare + Banjul Protocol member). National-only register HTML; no native API.

entities.name: Industrial Property Institute of Cabo Verde
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP (Cabo Verde Harare + Banjul effective 2025).

entities.name: Industrial Property Office (Eswatini)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Industrial Property Office (Gambia)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Industrial Property Office (Ghana)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Kenya Industrial Property Institute
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP. National IPAS exports also flow to the ARIPO Regional IP Database.

entities.name: Lesotho IP Office
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Liberia IP Office
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Department of the Registrar General (Malawi)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Industrial Property Office (Mauritius)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP (Mauritius acceded to Harare Protocol 2025-08-27).

entities.name: Industrial Property Institute (Mozambique)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Business and Intellectual Property Authority (Namibia)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Rwanda Development Board IP Office
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: National Quality Service (São Tomé and Príncipe)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Seychelles Business Centre IP Section
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP (Seychelles ARIPO member since 2022).

entities.name: Office of the Administrator and Registrar General (Sierra Leone)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Somalia IP Office
entities.rating_basis: Patent coverage limited (Somalia is the only ARIPO member NOT party to the Harare Protocol per WIPO INSPIRE). Banjul TM data via ARIPO regional layer only.

entities.name: Registrar General of Commercial Titles (Sudan)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Business Registrations and Licensing Agency (Tanzania mainland)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP. Tanzania mainland is an ARIPO Harare + Banjul member; Zanzibar is addressed separately under Banjul.

entities.name: Uganda Registration Services Bureau
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Patents and Companies Registration Agency (Zambia)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP.

entities.name: Zimbabwe IP Office (Companies and IP Office)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under ARIPO country code AP. Zimbabwe hosts the ARIPO secretariat.

entities.name: Benin (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Burkina Faso (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Cameroon (OAPI unitary, host state)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority. Cameroon hosts the OAPI secretariat in Yaoundé.

entities.name: Central African Republic (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Chad (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Comoros (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Republic of Congo (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Côte d'Ivoire (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Equatorial Guinea (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Gabon (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Guinea (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Guinea-Bissau (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Mali (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Mauritania (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Niger (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Senegal (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Togo (OAPI unitary)
entities.rating_basis: Patents covered via EPO OPS / INPADOC under OAPI country code OA. No national office — OAPI is the unitary IP authority.

entities.name: Office Marocain de la Propriété Industrielle et Commerciale
entities.rating_basis:
HTML/PDF-only register portals (search.ompic.ma, patent.ompic.ma,
patentregister.ompic.ma); paid subscription portal directinfo.ma is
per-document B2C/B2B with no machine credential or API flow. No
developer portal; 0 entries in WIPO IP API Catalog for MA. Despite
Morocco being uniquely EPO-integrated (only African EPO Validation
State, in force 2015-03-01) and OMPIC running an EPO-built patent
publication server, the office has NOT translated that EPO relationship
into a public API surface for itself.

unattached_sources.name: Google Patents (worldwide aggregator)
unattached_sources.issuing_body: Google LLC (aggregator; not an issuing authority)
unattached_sources.notes:
Non-authoritative aggregator; primary use is cross-jurisdiction reach
where authoritative registers (PPUBS, EPO OPS, JPO) don't reach.

unattached_sources.name: U.S. International Trade Commission (EDIS + DataWeb + HTS)
unattached_sources.notes:
Classified registered_ip by analogy to PTAB: a tribunal adjudicating
registered patents is part of the registered-IP lifecycle.

unattached_sources.name: PCT Guidelines (PCT-EPO Guidelines for Examination)
unattached_sources.issuing_body: European Patent Office / World Intellectual Property Organization

unattached_sources.name: Unitary Patent Guidelines
unattached_sources.issuing_body: European Patent Office (Unitary Patent Court Division)

unattached_sources.name: U.S. Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit — Opinions
unattached_sources.issuing_body: U.S. Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit

unattached_sources.name: CanLII — Canadian patent / trademark case law and statutes
Légifrance — French IP statutes (Code de la propriété intellectuelle + Code de commerce L.151 trade secrets)
unattached_sources.issuing_body: Direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA)

unattached_sources.name: Taiwan — Trade Secrets Act (營業秘密法, official English translation)
unattached_sources.issuing_body: Ministry of Justice (法務部) — Laws & Regulations Database of the Republic of China

unattached_sources.name: EUIPO EUTM Fee Schedule
unattached_sources.notes: Extracts F-xxx (EUTM) and M-xxx (Madrid) fees from the EUIPO Next.js SSR stream. EUR. 10-year renewal cycle. EUTMR Annex I.

unattached_sources.name: EUIPO REUD Fee Schedule
unattached_sources.notes: Post-Regulation 2024/2822 reform: back-loaded renewal curve at periods 1/2/3/4 (years 5/10/15/20 = €150/€250/€400/€700), combined application+publication fee, late-payment surcharges abolished.

unattached_sources.name: IP Australia Fee Schedule — Patents
unattached_sources.notes: Scrapes IP Australia's timeframes-and-fees page (13 small Action | Fee tables). AUD. Fees revised 2024-10-01 per the four-yearly fee review; PCT-fee equivalents updated 2026-01-01. v1 GAP: annual renewal fees (years 5-20) live in Schedule 7 of the Patents Regulations 1991 and are not on this page — follow-up scraper needed to pull them from the Federal Register of Legislation.

unattached_sources.name: IPO India Fee Schedule — Patents
unattached_sources.issuing_body: Office of the Controller General of Patents, Designs and Trade Marks (CGPDTM)
unattached_sources.notes: Scraped from the canonical Schedule 1 PDF (ipindia.gov.in/frontend/pdf/forms_and_official_fees/Schedule_1.pdf). pypdf + regex extraction. INR. 4 rate columns: small-applicant + other(s) × e-filing + paper. Paper-filing rows flagged via FeeCondition(trigger=paper_filing). All 18 renewal years (3-20) captured cleanly. Main numbered items (filing, exam, etc.) are PDF-structure-sensitive — a sanity check drops rows where rate columns appear misaligned (paper < e-file is impossible), so non-renewal coverage is partial in v1. PCT- specific fees live in Schedule 5 (separate PDF) and ship as a follow-up. Patents Rules 2003 Schedule 1 (as amended through Patents (Amendment) Rules 2024).
